name: vercel-ai-voice-selector
title: Voice Selector
author: Vercel
description: A searchable voice dialog with metadata, selection, and preview-control states.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Changed text alignment to a logical RTL-aware utility.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Changed text alignment to a logical RTL-aware utility.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
